message:
fix: kill process group on migration timeout to prevent orphaned children (gt-yqlb3)

exec.CommandContext only kills the bash process on timeout, leaving child
processes (dolt operations, backup scripts) orphaned and re-parented to
PID 1. Set Setpgid to create a new process group and use cmd.Cancel to
kill the entire group on timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ import (
 	"os/exec"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"strings"
+	"syscall"
 	"time"
 
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
@@ -375,6 +376,13 @@ func executeMigrationStep(_ *formula.Formula, cp *MigrationCheckpoint, step *for
 			c := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "bash", "-c", cmdStr)
 			c.Dir = townRoot
 			c.Env = append(os.Environ(), "GT_MIGRATION=1")
+			// Put the process in its own process group so we can kill
+			// all children on timeout, not just the bash process.
+			c.SysProcAttr = &syscall.SysProcAttr{Setpgid: true}
+			c.Cancel = func() error {
+				// Kill the entire process group to prevent orphaned children.
+				return syscall.Kill(-c.Process.Pid, syscall.SIGKILL)
+			}
 
 			output, err := c.CombinedOutput()
 			cancel()
